education.thesis: Interpretable Image Classification by AutoEncoder Model

education.final_year_project: Smart Video Surveillance System using Computer Vision

experience.domain: Warehouse & Logistics / Supply Chain (Returns – Lidl & Kaufland)
highlights: Migrated 2 critical backend services from Java to Kotlin within a 3-engineer team, maintaining Hexagonal Architecture for scalable, highly available solutions serving millions of users.
Drove Clean Code and TDD practices (Kotest, JUnit/Mockito) across features and bug fixes, reducing code smells via SonarQube.
Owned Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines with Docker and Kubernetes deployments; managed PostgreSQL schema migrations via Liquibase.
Built and shipped React (TypeScript) frontend features end-to-end, collaborating with Product Managers via Jira to translate supply chain requirements into production-ready functionality.
Visited warehouse to understand return workflows and clarify requirements directly with stakeholders.
Led Computer Vision research discussions on object detection and interpretable image classification, drawing on Bachelor's FYP and ongoing MS thesis.

projects.name: Loan Origination System (LOS)
highlights: Designed and shipped microservices supporting operations for over 7 banks and millions of users, applying design patterns and Clean Code principles.
Architected and optimized REST APIs documented with Swagger; wrote automated tests to ensure reliability across multiple banking integrations.
Integrated frontend teams using Angular (JavaScript) and owned CI/CD pipelines via Jenkins.
Managed MongoDB and SQL databases; coordinated cross-team delivery using Jira.

projects.name: Project 1: Domain Registry Applications
highlights: Built ICANN-recognized domain registry software for the Malaysian Government using Java (Spring Boot), MySQL, and JPA/Hibernate.
Authored REST API documentation with Swagger, enforced code quality via SonarQube, and ensured reliability through JUnit/Mockito unit testing.
Deployed services on Wildfly and configured server environments via PuTTY, maintaining stable production operations.

projects.name: Project 2: Briefing Management Platform
projects.domain: Enterprise SaaS (60+ Fortune 500 clients incl. LinkedIn, IBM, Nvidia, Salesforce, Red Hat)
highlights: Implemented business logic improvements and core features in a PHP (Laravel) and React (JavaScript) platform.
Refactored state management with Redux, integrated Zoom API for client meetings, and resolved legacy bugs to improve system stability.
Drove automation of printed material generation (PDFs, Word docs), reducing manual effort for briefing workflows.

projects.name: Smart Video Surveillance System
projects.description: Real-time gun detection and person identification system trained on 50,000 images with 70% accuracy. Distinguishes known vs unknown individuals and triggers alarms, notifying authorities within 3 seconds.

projects.name: Facial Emotion Recognition
projects.description: CNN-based facial emotion recognition model achieving 95% accuracy across neutral, happy, and sad states; validated on over 10,000 facial images.

projects.name: Recommender System
projects.description: Content-based movie recommender using Bag-of-Words and cosine similarity (top-5 results) and a collaborative clustering book recommender using Nearest Neighbor and Pearson Correlation (top-10 results).

projects.name: Life Expectancy at Birth
projects.description: Predictive model for life expectancy at birth for 2020, focusing on unemployed individuals, helping assess birth rates across countries and genders.

projects.name: What's Cooking?
projects.description: Cuisine type classifier trained on 60,000 dishes; auto-categorizes dishes based on ingredient similarities to enhance food recommendation systems.

projects.name: Zero-Shot Safety Violation Detection
projects.description: Real-time workplace safety monitoring system using CLIP to detect violations (e.g., missing PPE) via natural language prompts and zero-shot learning, eliminating task-specific model retraining.
